title: BEM-876 curator response
objective:

Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES
Findings:
- v1.4 is approved as a continuity correction: it preserves v1.2 high-level architecture and adds v1.3/v1.4 details without replacing earlier content.
- Terminology is corrected: Director and Worker are role-objects; Curator is an internal component inside every role-object.
- General Director is added above Directors for rules that apply to Directors.
- управляющий контур replaces управляющая плоскость.
- журнал событий replaces реестр времени.
- рабочая область becomes the unified term for development, testing, and main verified code areas.
- контур тестирования replaces duplicated audit/integration functions.
- managed shared channel under Curator policy is the selected data exchange model.
- rulebook becomes the self-learning mechanism: incident -> cleaned report -> Director/General Director rule update -> rule distribution.
Evidence:

- governance/audit/internal/results/BEM876_ANALYST_PROTOCOL_V14_REVIEW.md
